name: insurecrm-desktop
description: InsureCRM Desktop — local PostgreSQL + cloud license
author: InsureCRM

scripts.pack: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:win: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --publish always --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish:mac: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish:win: npm run sync:crm && npm run build && electron-builder --win --publish always --config electron-builder.yml
